programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Winds of Change
programme.desc: May 1919 Indy is in Paris working as a translator during the peace conference following the end of the Great War He meets up with TE Lawrence once more but finds his ideals have changed a lot since the start of the war Indy then decides to finally head home to Princeton even though it means having to face his father He gets reacquainted with his childhood friend Paul Robeson who becomes the subject of racism as they visit New York city

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.desc: A man with a fear of the dark accepts a job working in the dark sewers of Springwood And a video store clerk keeps having nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An Agatha Christie-style mystery sees the inhabitants of a remote hotel terrorized by rumors of a werewolf prowling the area Not to fear as a self-appointed werewolf hunter is amongst them But might he have a dark secret of his own

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bitter elderly woman learns that her husband and a laid-back couple are hiding a youth potion from her while camping in the wilderness

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Jane works for a company that provides various online services including sex chat with an online sex operator Her deadbeat husband Robert obsessively chats with operator named Liz She tells him to kill his wife Or is he imagining it

programme.title: Hitchhiker 509
programme.desc: A homeless conman couple tries to swindle a seemingly senile old lady out of her home by trying to convince her that the war is still on Big mistake

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilots resistance to interrogation Hogan brings the mans fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Daan leaves and doesnt being Liam along Zoor is frantic as to why Daan left Liam wants to help but Zoor doesnt trust him because he doesnt have a CVI so Liam agrees to be implanted But his CVI enables Zoor to see and hear what Liam does So he tells Renee She tells Street who comes up with a plan to make double of Liam which doesnt have a CVI so with the double they try to find Daan

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The remaining members of the team set up a new home and try to deal with their grief The Morthren also have to find a fresh refuge and as part of this they kidnap and duplicate a priest who runs a homeless shelter

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A glimpse into a future devastated by man-made environmental disaster ensures that Senator Parker will take action to prevent it happening - to the best of his ability at least But that may not be enough

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A young concert violinist virtuoso begins to buckle under both the strain of performing and the demands of his authoritative manager Max himself a former violinist Kimble suspects he might resort to a desperate act to rid himself of Max

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Stagge City pop 407 and is promptly arrested on trumped-up vagrant charges After a trial lasting less then a minute hes sentenced to 90 days hard-labor at the nearby silver mine - owned by Stagge

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Racing across the country from LA to New York a plethora of exotic cars carry contestants hoping to win a very large sum

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mike Hernandez is here to take the Bantamweight title away from Jesse Arnett. Coming off of a 6 win streak, he is in the Hard Knocks cage for nothing else but the belt!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chaleur Jones

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Vladimir Zenin v. Nick Aggalar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Georgina van der Linden v. Samantha Van Doorn Martin Pacas v. Ismael Lazaar Ulrik Bokeme v. Ibrahim El Boustati Redouan Laarkoubi v. Yassan Baitar Jonay Risco v. Tayfun Ozcan Nordin Ben Moh v. Mohammed Jaraya Ilias Bulaid v. Zakaria Zouggary

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Dre Infinite Capri Compton Interview
programme.desc: From different worlds and 2 different culturals Meet the rap star and the opera star who got together an made a few hits

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claws henchman tries to take Gadgets watch

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill cons a well-meaning alien into helping liberate GoBotron by attacking the Guardians

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Vantus sorcery continues Flora is still sick and very contagious They head for the planet Andarin with its powerful energy strong enough to save Flora Unfortunately they are heading right into a trap of Vantus They find the wizard Warp

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League discovers the Liberty Stone on Paxtar and once again they go in search of it hoping that its power will lead them to Audric Gillian alters their body structure so they can withstand the gravity pressure on Paxtar

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorizes Tokyo Japan using a new vehicle called Blackout which is capable of draining electrical power supplies

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles
